name: Mom's 4-bean Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from all cut beans and set aside.
2. Drain the kidney beans and garbanzos; rinse them, discarding the juice.
3. Mix together the kidney beans and garbanzos.
4. Peel the onions, slice them, and separate the rings.
5. To layer: Place 1/4 of the onions, 1/3 of the green beans, 1/3 of the wax beans, and 1/3 of the kidney/garbanzo mixture in a large bowl.
6. Repeat the layering process.
7. Marinate: Mix any retained juice with sugar and vinegar (use all wine vinegar if desired). Add tarragon, basil, and black pepper to the marinade.
8. Stir until well combined and taste to ensure the desired balance of sweetness and acidity.
9. Pour the marinade over the beans. If serving uncovered, mix 1/2 cup water with 1/4 cup sugar and 1/4 cup vinegar to create additional liquid.
10. Allow the salad to marinate for at least 2 days before serving. You can also add cucumbers, avocado, sweet bell pepper, or pimento for extra flavor and texture.
